description: for/lift list render (§42 / §7). Two add-clicks append two items; the list renders two .item rows and #count reads 2. Whole-tree mode captures an impl#1-private lift-target <div> wrapper (an OQ1 brittleness data point); anchored mode is wrapper-agnostic.
rationale: §42 for/lift markup iteration: a reactive @items write re-renders the lifted rows. The whole-tree dom exposes impl#1's lift-container <div>; the anchored .item count is impl-neutral.
